# cancel()

**Instance Method**

Cancels a metadata request.

## Declaration

```swift
func cancel()
```

## Discussion

This method invokes the completion handler with the error code [doc://com.apple.Link-Presentation/documentation/LinkPresentation/LPError/Code/metadataFetchCancelled] if the request hasn’t already completed.

## Fetching metadata

- **startFetchingMetadata(for:completionHandler:)**: Fetches metadata for the given URL.
- **shouldFetchSubresources**: A Boolean value indicating whether to download subresources specified by the metadata.
- **timeout**: The time interval after which the request automatically fails if it hasn’t already completed.
